title: OpenSourceHub
oneliner: A GitHub intelligence platform that scores repo health and surfaces hidden gems.
description: Built for developers who want to find quality open source projects fast. Features health scoring, beginner filters, trending detection, and a low-friction zero-auth browsing flow.
metric: 6-hour cache TTL / zero auth / edge functions

title: Linkinbio
oneliner: A mobile-first link hub with tabs, JSON-driven cards, and SEO-ready structure.
description: Linkinbio is a dark cyberpunk-style profile page for links and digital products. It uses plain HTML/CSS/JS with JSON-powered links and shop sections, responsive layout, and strong SEO metadata for social previews.
metric: JSON-powered cards / mobile-first UI / static hosting

title: DayKit
oneliner: A privacy-first toolkit of daily utilities that runs fast in the browser.
description: DayKit is a lightweight utility web app with tools like age calculator, text cleaner, password checker, focus timer, and countdown. It is built for zero-friction usage with no login and privacy-first client-side behavior.
metric: Client-side tools / no-login flow / static deploy
